zh.Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾塔努易爾特
zh.Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格林爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina MacLeod於大約1330年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格林爾時，她的父親Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis62歲，母親Margaret Macnicol56歲。她於大約1350年與Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1407年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾塔努易爾特享年79歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾塔努易爾特
zh-hans.Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾格林爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina MacLeod于大约1330年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾格林爾时，她的父亲Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis62岁，母亲Margaret Macnicol56岁。她于大约1350年与Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1407年在苏格兰阿吉爾塔努易爾特享年79岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina MacLeod was born about 1330, in Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis, was 62 and her mother, Margaret Macnicol, was 56. She married Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie about 1350, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1407, in Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 79, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina MacLeod est née environ 1330, à Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Margaret Macnicol, avait 56 ans. Elle a épousé Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie environ 1350, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1407, à Taynuilt, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina MacLeod um 1330 in Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis 62 und ihre Mutter Margaret Macnicol 56. Sie hat um 1350 in Scotland Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1407 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina MacLeod è nata il circa 1330 nel Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Margaret Macnicol, aveva 56 anni. Lei sposato Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie circa 1350, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1407, nel Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina MacLeodが約1330年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグリーネルグで生まれた時，父Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewisは62歳，母Margaret Macnicolは56歳であった。約1350年にスコットランドでHector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1407年にスコットランドアルグイルティイヌイルトで79歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina MacLeod(이)가 대략 1330년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 글렌그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Macnicol(은)는 56세였다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 스컷랜드에서 Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 스컷랜드 아그이 타이누이트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1330–about 1407: tany ho any amin'ny 1330–tany ho any amin'ny 1407

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina MacLeod nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Macnicol, tinha 56 anos. Ela casou-se com Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie aproximadamente 1350, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1407, em Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina MacLeod родилась около 1330 г. в местности глинелг, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Macnicol, 56. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie около 1350 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1407 г. в местности теинуилт, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

sm.about 1330–about 1407: e tusa o le 1330–e tusa o le 1407

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christina MacLeod nació aproximadamente 1330, en Glenelg, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Margaret Macnicol, tenía 56 años. Se casó con Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie aproximadamente 1350, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1407, en Taynuilt, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
